description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The property includes a driveway with a garage, a swimming pool, and multiple green lawn areas, as well as a detached outbuilding or guest house at the rear. Outdoor amenities such as a shaded patio, lounge seating, and landscaped gardens are visible, enhancing the residential comfort. The main entrance is set back from the street, with a paved walkway leading to the front door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong connection to the surrounding outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, a garage, pool, and landscaped gardens. The design features open spaces and strong indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a glimpse of the open lawn and patio areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, green lawns, and the rear outbuilding with the pool area visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, shaded patio, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the bungalow, the pool, and the detached outbuilding.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
